name: agy
description: Use the Google Antigravity CLI (`agy`) from inside Claude Code — slash commands /agy:setup, /agy:ask, /agy:delegate, /agy:research, /agy:review, /agy:image, /agy:help. Supports per-call model selection via --model. Fork of simplybychris/antigravity-plugin-cc extended toward codex-plugin-cc parity.
